subject: Spoink, a small round pig-like Pokemon with a coiled spring tail, bouncing amid tropical foliage
description: A small, round, pale-grey creature with stubby limbs and pig-like facial features is depicted mid-bounce, its body slightly airborne and tilted. A coiled spring forms its lower body in place of legs. The creature wears what appears to be a small pearl or orb on its head. The surrounding environment is lush tropical foliage — large green leaves and yellow flowers frame the figure. The style is soft and painterly, with a watercolor-like quality distinct from the sharper linework of other cards in the set.
foreground: Small round pale creature with coiled spring base, appearing to bounce, with orb on head
background: Dense tropical foliage with large leaves and yellow flowers
